memories.title: Subscription renew failing with error code 402
memories.content: I've been trying to renew our corporate plan for the last 3 days using our corporate Visa. The checkout page keeps spinning and eventually throws a Stripe timeout error code 402. We need this sorted ASAP as our team is locked out of dashboard controls.

memories.title: Onboarding flow is incredibly confusing
memories.content: Just signed up for Revoxa and I'm totally lost. The workspace invite email was expired when my developer clicked it. Then we couldn't figure out how to import the CSV file because the template page kept returning a 500 server error. Documentation is sparse.

memories.title: Slack notifications lag by 30 mins
memories.content: The webhook integrations are useful but we noticed that Slack alerts for new customer issues are delayed by 25 to 30 minutes. Real-time updates should actually be real-time, otherwise we check the dashboard manually anyway.

memories.title: Love the new memory graph feature!
memories.content: The React Flow Memory Graph is absolutely incredible! We can easily trace feedback items directly to our release schedules and pinpoint feature requests. This is a game-changer for product sprint planning.

memories.title: Cannot download PDF executive reports
memories.content: Whenever I click 'Generate Report' and select PDF format, the loading icon spins forever. Eventually, the browser says the network connection timed out. CSV export works fine, but we need PDF for our board meetings.

memories.title: Feedback report regarding Slow Recharts Dashboard rendering
memories.content: Feedback comment submitted by client. The main theme is related to slow recharts dashboard rendering and they would like this resolved quickly. Interface performance is crucial.

models.name: Payment Issues
models.summary: Reflects checkout friction, credit card declines, PayPal gateway timeouts, subscription renew failures, and Stripe integration bugs.

models.name: Customer Pain Points
models.summary: Tracks onboarding hurdles, lack of documentation, slow response times on support channels, and difficulties with custom dashboard configurations.

models.name: Feature Requests
models.summary: Consolidates requests for dark mode, mobile applications, multi-workspace support, API webhooks, and deeper Hubspot syncing workflows.

models.name: Product Bugs
models.summary: Aggregates reportings of active sessions expiring prematurely, page crashes on heavy Recharts layouts, and CSV export file formatting errors.

models.name: Onboarding Friction
models.summary: Identifies drops in user activation due to excessive setup steps, email validation bugs, and initial workspace invitation failures.

feedbacks.title: Subscription renew failing with error code 402
feedbacks.content: I've been trying to renew our corporate plan for the last 3 days using our corporate Visa. The checkout page keeps spinning and eventually throws a Stripe timeout error code 402. We need this sorted ASAP as our team is locked out of dashboard controls.

feedbacks.title: Onboarding flow is incredibly confusing
feedbacks.content: Just signed up for Revoxa and I'm totally lost. The workspace invite email was expired when my developer clicked it. Then we couldn't figure out how to import the CSV file because the template page kept returning a 500 server error. Documentation is sparse.

feedbacks.title: Slack notifications lag by 30 mins
feedbacks.content: The webhook integrations are useful but we noticed that Slack alerts for new customer issues are delayed by 25 to 30 minutes. Real-time updates should actually be real-time, otherwise we check the dashboard manually anyway.

feedbacks.title: Love the new memory graph feature!
feedbacks.content: The React Flow Memory Graph is absolutely incredible! We can easily trace feedback items directly to our release schedules and pinpoint feature requests. This is a game-changer for product sprint planning.

feedbacks.title: Cannot download PDF executive reports
feedbacks.content: Whenever I click 'Generate Report' and select PDF format, the loading icon spins forever. Eventually, the browser says the network connection timed out. CSV export works fine, but we need PDF for our board meetings.

recommendations.title: Upgrade Stripe Webhook Concurrency Limits
recommendations.description: Memory recall shows checkout timeouts peaked during European business hours. Increase API handler workers to prevent gateway dropouts.
recommendations.business_impact: Reduce cart abandonment and secure pending subscriptions.
recommendations.suggested_action: Edit `services/stripe.py` thread-pool config and check AWS server limits.

recommendations.title: Redesign Workspace Member Invitation Flow
recommendations.description: Reflection analysis highlights 42 complaints regarding expired verification tokens. Change token duration from 2 hours to 24 hours.
recommendations.business_impact: Boost workspace activation rate by 14.5% MoM.
recommendations.suggested_action: Update Supabase JWT expiration hook in invite handler.

recommendations.title: Build Slack Alerts Notification Toggle
recommendations.description: Ingestion trends reveal high demand for real-time notifications when new Critical feedback arrives.
recommendations.business_impact: Reduce customer support SLA times from 4 hours to 15 minutes.
recommendations.suggested_action: Leverage Slack incoming webhooks and deploy message dispatcher.

recommendations.title: Fix Chart Legend Contrast in Light Theme
recommendations.description: Several customers on Twitter reported text formatting difficulties in the Executive PDF exports on laptops.
recommendations.suggested_action: Override chart typography color styles to Deep Slate (#1E2433).

timelineEvents.title: Platform Memory Initialization
timelineEvents.description: Successfully configured Hindsight client vector pipelines. Started scraping Discord user groups.

timelineEvents.title: Emergence of Stripe Checkout Gateway timeouts
timelineEvents.description: Groq detection marked Stripe 402 response clusters with high priority. Triggered action ticket.

timelineEvents.title: Workspace Invite Security Patch Release
timelineEvents.description: Resolved the 2-hour invitation token expiry friction. Workspace onboarding statistics increased 18% MoM.

timelineEvents.title: Deep Memory Retrieval Engine Upgrade
timelineEvents.description: Embedded Hindsight Recall with context mapping. AI assistant response accuracy rose to 98.4%.

timelineEvents.title: 12-Month Historical Forecast Prediction
timelineEvents.description: Began modeling customer pain point vectors to recommend preventative engineering tasks.

notifications.title: New Critical Cluster Detected
notifications.message: Stripe Checkout Gateway Timeout is surging (+42% growth rate in last 4 hours).

notifications.title: Slack webhook connection warning
notifications.message: Integration returned status code 429: Too Many Requests on alert dispatcher.

notifications.title: Monthly Report Ready
notifications.message: May 2026 Executive Performance Summary has been generated.

notifications.title: Issue #104 Assigned
notifications.message: Alex Rivera assigned you to 'Investigate checkout failure code 402'.

workspaceTasks.title: Write weekly board meeting PDF draft
